solution.p: Our variable x is multiplied by the fraction -\frac{3}{5}\text{.} This is a negative number, so we should multiply by something negative to undo that part. But also we should multiply by the reciprocal of \frac{3}{5}\text{,} which is \frac{5}{3}\text{.} All together, we should multiply each side by -\frac{5}{3}\text{.}
We should check the solution by substituting -\frac{55}{3} in for x in the original equation:
The solution -\frac{55}{3} is checked, and the solution set is \left\{-\frac{55}{3}\right\}\text{.}
